title: Draft solution and test plan for path resolution fixes
summary: Plan drafted: enforce repo_root validation at startup, keep .agent paths centralized in RepoContext, and add tests for CWD guard and path resolution.
acceptance_criteria: Defines the proposed fix scope and target modules/files.
Specifies how path expansion is centralized and corrected.
Includes a test plan aligned with >=90% coverage requirement.
Identifies any risks or edge cases (e.g., CWD == '/').

steps.description: Summarize the intended fix and enumerate target modules for changes.
Describe how to centralize path resolution logic and validate CWD at startup.
Draft a test plan covering success/failure paths and coverage targets.

notes: Target modules: repo_context.py (repo_root validation + .agent path helpers), main.py (startup guard), state_rebuilder.py (relative path resolution), ops_tools.py/state_store.py (consumers).
Approach: add a single repo_root validation/normalization step to reject CWD == '/' and ensure all tool paths flow through RepoContext; audit for any direct '/.agent' usage (none found so far).

Test plan: add unit tests for RepoContext root guard (raises on '/'); verify state artifact paths resolve to '<cwd>/.agent/...'; verify StateRebuilder.resolve_path resolves relative paths against repo_root; ensure coverage >= 90%.
